title: Regulation No. 1 of 2006 on 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz Frequency Licensing
summary: Requires persons using 2.4 GHz or 5 GHz spectrum in Bahrain to obtain a frequency licence, with additional telecommunications licensing where the system is used to provide a public telecommunications network or service, making it relevant to Wi-Fi, sensor, and connected-device networks.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.iot_connected_devices: Regulates licensed use of 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz spectrum.
theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.spectrum: Regulates use of 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz spectrum.

notes: Related instruments: Telecommunications Law and National Frequency Plan 2024
